## How to test

## Checklist

* [ ] It is **usable and accessible**. It supports dark mode, as well as accessibility features such as VoiceOver, Dynamic Type.
* [ ] It is **secure and respects user privacy**. It maintains confidentiality, integrity and availability to an acceptable level.
* [ ] It is **localised and internationalised**. Any new strings have been added to POEditor.
* [ ] It has **unit tests** that cover all important (business) logic.
* [ ] Its **performance** is at an acceptable level.
